About this place
Spacious, Furnished Room Available in 3B/3B Apartment – The Lodge on the Trail
Looking for someone to take over my lease from March 15, 2026 (earliest move-in) to July 24, 2026. The lease is managed directly by the apartment complex office.
This is a comfortable, high-quality, and fully furnished private bedroom with an attached bathroom in a 3B/3B apartment at The Lodge on the Trail. The unit includes:
High-speed Wi-Fi
In-unit laundry
Free parking
Spacious common areas (kitchen and living room)
The apartment complex offers excellent amenities, including:
Fitness center
Basketball, volleyball, and tennis courts
Swimming pool
Courthouse
The location is highly convenient, with a bus stop right at the entrance providing a 10-15 minute ride to campus. It's also next to Celery Bog Nature Area and very close to a supermarket.
If you're interested, feel free to reach out!

1 Bed-1 Bath apartment in Campus Edge
Over 600 Sq Ft.
The apartment comes fully furnished with a great view and is within walking distance of campus!

Looking for housing near campus for the 2026–2027 school year?
I’m leasing two bedrooms in a large five-bedroom house just minutes from campus. Even better only three people total will be living in the house, so you’ll essentially get two rooms for the price of one — perfect if you want extra space for an office, storage, or anything else.
The house is fully furnished, spacious, and very comfortable. Move-in and move-out dates are flexible, and it’s a great deal for anyone who wants more space, privacy, and convenience close to campus.

No security deposit or renter’s insurance required — I have already covered both

Over 2,800 sq. ft. | Two stories with a full-size basement (one of the largest near Purdue)

Large fenced-in backyard with a firepit (s'mores not included)
